task: Find everything relevant to this question: are SponJIT docs/code already aligned with the newly clarified Tier 2 direction, or do they need updates? The clarified direction is: Tier 2 is a semantic linker/longer fusion layer whose link phase can omit redundant boundary work between stencils by carrying virtual endpoint state, delayed commits, residency/facts, and projection obligations; runtime still only selects/copies/links/patches pre-emitted native fragments and must not synthesize instructions. Gather first-order facts only. Inspect the main SponJIT docs/specs and current code/tests for: places that already state this, places that contradict it, places that are stale (old C-function tile wording, abstract-only planner wording, runtime status), and concrete files/data structures that would need doc/code updates. Do not propose an architecture; just report facts and mismatches with file paths.
